briefdescription.para: Construct a GameObject wrapper for an entity handle in a scene.

parameterdescription.para: The entity handle identifying the object in the scene registry.
Pointer to the Scene that owns the entity.

briefdescription.para: Destroy the GameObject wrapper.

detaileddescription.para: This is the public destructor for the handle wrapper. See implementation for cleanup.

briefdescription.para: Set the active flag for this game object.
Query the active flag of this game object.

simplesect.para: true if the object is marked active, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Attach this object to a parent game object.

parameterdescription.para: If true, attempt to preserve world transform. See implementation for details.

briefdescription.para: Detach the specified child object from this object.
Get the root ancestor of this object.

simplesect.para: The root GameObject in this object's hierarchy.

briefdescription.para: Get the root ancestor of this object (const overload).

simplesect.para: The root GameObject in this object's hierarchy.

briefdescription.para: Get the scene that owns this GameObject.
Check whether this GameObject references a valid entity.

simplesect.para: true if the wrapper refers to a valid entity handle, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Check whether this GameObject is a root (has no parent).

simplesect.para: true if this object is a root, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Add a component to this GameObject by runtime BClass description.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the runtime class describing the component type.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the created component storage.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve a component by runtime BClass description.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the runtime class describing the component type.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the component if present, otherwise implementation-defined.

briefdescription.para: Get a component by class, or add it if not present.

parameterdescription.para: Runtime class descriptor for the component.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the existing or newly added component.

briefdescription.para: Check whether this GameObject has a component matching the runtime class.

simplesect.para: true if the component exists on the object, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Remove a component from this GameObject by runtime class.

parameterdescription.para: Runtime class descriptor for the component to remove.

briefdescription.para: Mark or perform destruction of the underlying entity.

detaileddescription.para: See implementation for exact destruction semantics and timing.

briefdescription.para: Get the parent GameObject of this object.

simplesect.para: Parent GameObject, or an invalid GameObject if none.

briefdescription.para: Get the list of children for this GameObject.

simplesect.para: Vector containing child GameObjects. Ownership remains with the scene.

briefdescription.para: Attach this object to a parent (alternative API to AttachToGameObject).

parameterdescription.para: If true, attempt to preserve world transform. See implementation.

briefdescription.para: Detach the given child from this object (alternative API to DetachGameObject).
Detach this object from its parent.
Get the UUID associated with this GameObject.

simplesect.para: UUID for the object as stored in its UUID component.

briefdescription.para: Access the transform component for this object.
Const access to the transform component for this object.

simplesect.para: Const reference to the object's TransformComponent.
